Text 10
O son of Pritha, know that I am the original seed of all existences,
the intelligence of the intelligent and the prowess of powerful men.
We see lot of powerful men,
lot of intelligent men in this world.
This intelligence, prowess, power is bestowed by the Lord.
According to what?
Why everyone has different intelligence, different power,
different prowess, different abilities?
Why?
According to our karma.
As you sow, so shall you reap.
Krishna says I am equal to everyone.
Samoham surve bhuteshu naame dveshi stina priyaha.
So each one of us have attracted some abilities, some talents,
some power, some wealth, some fame, some position.
It's a cumulative effect of the actions we have done in this life and over many many lifetimes.
But this ability is coming from the Lord.
Whatever we think is my ability, today if I am able to speak well,
or if I have some power,
it is given to me by the Lord and one day it will be taken away.
If I am beautiful today, one day that beauty will go.
I am just a Kshetrajna.
Kshetrajna means knower of the field of these activities.
Kshetra and Kshetrajna.
Kshetra is this body.

I am a spirit soul, in one sense you can call it.
It possesses nothing.

So Acharya says, so long as we have some ability, some power,
we should recognize that it is coming from the Lord
and the best use of that power, that ability, that wealth, that strength, whatever we have,
is to offer it back to the Lord, to serve the Lord with that.
